title: FOOD PANTRY AND MEALS - 211info
text: CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER FOOD PANTRY AND MEALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides food, to-go meals, home-delivered food boxes, and pet food when available. 8800 SE 80th Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Groceries (Food Pantry): Tuesday/Thursday noon-4pm To-go Meals: Tuesday-Thursday 1pm-2:30pm, Sunday 3pm-3:30pm Email (503) 771-7914 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 771-7914 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Food delivery: Zip codes 97015, 97027, 97045, 97086, 97202, 97206, 97214, 97215, 97216, 97222, 97266, and 97267 TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 82nd and Cornwell are the nearest cross streets. Located near the intersection of 82nd and Johnson Creek Boulevard. Turn left on Cornwell, just past the Fred Meyer parking lot and O'Reilly Auto Parts. Served by TriMet Bus Line 72 (82nd Avenue). Services: Community Meals Food Pantries Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - PERSONAL GOODS AND DIAPERS MATERIAL GOODS - SHOWERS AND LAUNDRY OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - MEDICAL SERVICES AND NEEDLE EXCHANGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CLACKAMAS SERVICE CENTER
